metadata.description: Strix Open — the SGRF v1 governance-review skills. Review how any system governs execution, score it on four orthogonal axes, and wire a first governed action. Advisory; no Strix account required.

plugins.name: strix-governance
plugins.description: Run a Strix Governance Review (SGRF v1) on a system (/strix-governance:runtime-governance-review), a PR (/strix-governance:govern-pr), or a release (/strix-governance:release-readiness) — and wire a first governed, recorded action (/strix-governance:strix-wire). Plugin skills are namespaced /strix-governance:<skill>. The three review lenses are advisory and run anywhere; strix-wire needs a Strix runtime.
